'''Jorga''' was a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Gunnery officer/Legends|gunnery officer]] serving aboard the [[Admiral Ackbar (Victory-class)|''Admiral Ackbar'']], under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nek Bwua'tu]] during the [[Dark Nest Crisis]].<ref name="Dark Nest" />

When the [[Gorog|Dark Nest]] attempted to flee its [[Planet/Legends|homeworld]], its fleet came up [[Battle of the Murgo Choke|against]] the [[Fifth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Fifth Fleet]] in the [[Murgo Choke]]. As the ''Admiral Ackbar'' went to battle stations, Jorga was tasked with assigning targets to the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer's]] [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] batteries.<ref name="Dark Nest" />
